description: Agent-native OpenAPI subset for SE Ranking Data API and Project API based on official docs at https://seranking.com/api.html. Includes high-value read endpoints plus guarded write/recheck audit operations.

tools.name: account_get-subscription-details
tools.description: Get subscription details. Returns the AccountGetSubscriptionDetailsResponse.
